hero.name: Naoki Kobayashi
hero.title: Full-Stack Engineer / DX Consultant
hero.tagline: Driving your business forward through efficiency and cost reduction.

about.heading: About Me
about.body:
A full-stack engineer with 5 years of experience in web application development using Ruby on Rails, TypeScript, React, Vue.js, and Docker — covering the full lifecycle from requirements definition to maintenance.

I specialize in backend development with Ruby on Rails and frontend UI implementation with React and Vue.js. I am experienced in both waterfall and agile methodologies.

Before becoming an engineer, I worked in sales and general affairs, giving me a strong foundation in client communication and cross-departmental coordination. I always prioritize fast, clear responses.

I am actively exploring AI-powered development workflows to boost efficiency. For agriculture and local businesses, I provide DX consulting focused on operational efficiency and cost reduction.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subheading: Feel free to reach out for SES project inquiries or DX consulting.
